title: TensorFlow Serving Predict Request
description: Schema for a prediction request to the TensorFlow Serving REST API, used to send input data for model inference.

signature_name.description: The TensorFlow serving signature to invoke. Defaults to 'serving_default'.

instances.description: A list of input instances in row format. Each instance is an object or value matching the model's input signature.

inputs.description: Input tensors in columnar format. Keys are input tensor names, values are the tensor data.

InputInstance.description: A single input instance for prediction

TensorValue.description: A tensor value which can be a scalar, list, or nested list
